/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & TO SET MTS HEARING/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:DELIA SALAZAR (5 FEET)/X:DEFENDANT MUST HAVE NO PERSONAL, ELECTRONIC, TELPHONIC, ORWRITTEN CONTACT WITH THE PROTECTED PERSON NAMED ABOVE, UNLESS CONTACT IS PEACEFUL, REASONABLE, AND DIRECTLY RELATED TO TENACY AND OCCURS AT THE ADDRESS/X:DEFENDANT MUST HAVE NO CONTACT WITH THE PROTECTED PERSONS NAMED ABOVETHROUGH A THIRD PARTY, EXCEPT AN ATTORNEY OF RECORD,/X:THE PROTECTED PERSONS MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY THE RESTRAINED PERSON,//CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
